name: a framework with no namespace of its own resolves as needs_source but still activates its umbrella
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/resolve-technology.sh" Angular 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'r=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); exit(r["specific"]["status"]=="needs_source" && r["specific"]["namespace"].nil? && !r["activated_namespaces"].empty? ? 0:1)' && echo needs-source-still-activates 1>&2
